creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
man 7 zpool-features

* works on FreeBSD 14.0-CURRENT (with openzfs-2021073000 and 
  openzfs-kmod-2021073000 installed but /boot/loader.conf 
  set to openzfs_load="NO")

* does not work with an installation of 13.0-RELEASE-p4. 

man 5 zpool-features

* works on 13.0-RELEASE-p4, however – an underlying issue –
  file formats (section 5) is not appropriate for the content

* does not work on the same FreeBSD 14.0-CURRENT.


<https://www.freebsd.org/cgi/man.cgi?query=zpool-features&apropos=0&sektion=7&manpath=FreeBSD+14.0-current&arch=default&format=html> for 14.0-CURRENT finds nothing, which is probably reasonable, given this: 


% pkg provides zpool-features.
Name    : openzfs-2021073000
Desc    : OpenZFS userland for FreeBSD
Repo    : FreeBSD
Filename: usr/local/man/man7/zpool-features.7.gz
% 


<https://www.freebsd.org/cgi/man.cgi?query=zpool-features&apropos=0&sektion=7&manpath=FreeBSD+13.0-RELEASE+and+Ports&arch=default&format=html> 

* 13.0-RELEASE + ports

* should probably find the port-related manual page in section 7.
